## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in EU5MinerMCP.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy src`
- [ ] `uv build`

## Notes

- [ ] Parser, VFS, and domain logic remain in the core `eu5miner` library when applicable.
- [ ] The default workflow remains usable without a local EU5 install when practical.
